story.iWant: a clean database schema with Docker-based reset capability
story.soThat: I can iterate rapidly during development without migration conflicts and have a solid foundation for the workflow execution engine

task.title: Update Database Schema Files
task.subtask: Update workflows.ts - add initializerType, remove isProjectInitializer, add index on module
Update projects.ts - add userId FK, add index on userId
Update app-config.ts - add userId unique constraint and FK
Create step-configs.ts - define Zod schemas for 5 step config types
Delete deprecated table files (workflow-step-branches, workflow-step-actions)
Update workflow-steps.ts - add index on workflowId
Update workflow-executions.ts - add indexes on status and projectId

task.title: Create Docker Reset Script
task.subtask: Create scripts/reset-db.sh with warning prompt and docker compose commands
Make script executable (chmod +x)
Add npm scripts to root package.json (db:reset, db:push)

task.title: Remove Migration System
task.subtask: Delete all migration files from packages/db/src/migrations/
Remove migration scripts from packages/db/package.json
Update .gitignore to exclude migrations folder

task.title: Configure Test Framework
task.subtask: Verify Bun test configuration
Create schema.test.ts for schema validation tests
Create step-configs.test.ts for Zod schema validation tests
Create constraints.test.ts for foreign key constraint tests

task.title: Validate Complete Schema
task.subtask: Run reset script and verify success (test idempotency 3x)
Verify all 15 tables created via psql
Verify 5 indexes created
Verify schema changes (initializerType, userId FK, etc.)
Run all tests and verify passing

criterion.title: Schema Update Complete
criterion.requirement: Update workflows table: add initializerType field, remove isProjectInitializer
Update projects table: add userId foreign key
Update app_config table: add userId unique constraint
Define TypeScript step config types using Zod schemas: AskUserStepConfig, AskUserChatStepConfig, ExecuteActionStepConfig, LLMGenerateStepConfig, DisplayOutputStepConfig

criterion.title: Docker Reset Script Functional
criterion.requirement: Script scripts/reset-db.sh created with docker-compose down -v, up -d, and Drizzle push
Script is executable and runs without errors

criterion.title: Migration System Suspended for MVP
criterion.requirement: All files in packages/db/src/migrations/ deleted for MVP phase
KEEP migration commands in package.json scripts - they will be needed for production later
Schema changes applied directly via drizzle-kit push during MVP development
Add clear documentation: Docker reset approach is MVP-ONLY, migrations will be re-enabled for production

criterion.title: Database Tables and Relationships
criterion.requirement: All 15 tables created with correct schema (Workflows, Execution/State, Templates/Agents, Auth/User, Optional dialog_sessions)
Indexes on frequently queried columns: projects.userId, workflows.module, workflow_executions.status, workflow_steps.workflowId

criterion.title: Test Framework Configured
criterion.requirement: Bun test framework configured (test files: *.test.ts or *.spec.ts)
At least one schema validation test exists
Command 'bun test' runs successfully without errors

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Foundation + Workflow-Init Engine
doc.section: Data Models and Contracts - Core Database Tables
doc.snippet: Complete schema definitions for all 15 tables including workflows, workflow_steps, workflow_executions, projects, workflow_paths, agents, and app_config. Step config types defined using Zod schemas with JSONB storage for extensibility.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Foundation + Workflow-Init Engine
doc.snippet: Key architectural patterns: JSONB step configuration in workflow_steps.config field (no new tables for new patterns), tag-based workflow path filtering using JSONB tags, dual progress tracking with executedSteps and executedVsPath, multi-user isolation via userId foreign keys.

doc.title: Database Schema Architecture
doc.snippet: Complete 15-table schema categorized into: Workflow Definition (2), Execution & State (5), Templates & Agents (2), Auth & User (5), Optional (1). Uses PostgreSQL 17 with Drizzle ORM 0.44.2 for type-safe operations.

doc.title: Database Schema Architecture
doc.snippet: All step-specific configuration lives in workflow_steps.config JSONB field to enable adding new step types without schema migrations. Branches and actions embedded in step config for runtime extensibility.

doc.title: Chiron Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: FR001: Store workflow definitions in PostgreSQL database and execute from database. FR004: Resolve variables using 4-level precedence. FR005: Maintain workflow state and enable resume/restart.

doc.title: Chiron Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: FR032: Initialize and migrate Chiron PostgreSQL database on first launch, creating all required tables for system-wide and project-specific data.

file.reason: Contains isProjectInitializer field that needs to be replaced with initializerType. Current definition uses boolean, need to change to text field with nullable values for "new-project", "existing-project", or null.
workflow_steps table definition with existing indexes. Need to verify index structure matches requirements.
Contains status and projectId fields that need indexes. Already has indexes defined, need to verify completeness.
Existing TypeScript step config types. These will be replaced with Zod schema-based types in new step-configs.ts file.
Projects table exists but missing userId foreign key. Need to add userId field with reference to user(id) and create index on it.
App config table exists but missing userId unique constraint. Need to add userId field with unique constraint and FK to user table.
Better-auth managed tables. These are the reference tables for userId foreign keys. Do NOT modify these tables.
Deprecated tables that need to be removed. Step branches and actions now inline in step config JSONB.

dependencies.package: Type-safe ORM for PostgreSQL schema definitions and queries
PostgreSQL client driver for database connections
Drizzle CLI tools for schema push, migrations, and studio
Runtime validation and TypeScript type inference for step config schemas

constraints.constraint: Docker reset approach is MVP-ONLY. Keep migration commands in package.json for future production use. Do NOT remove db:generate or db:migrate scripts - only delete migration files.
JSONB step configuration pattern: All step-specific config stored in workflow_steps.config JSONB field. No separate tables for branches or actions.
Better-auth table compatibility: Do NOT modify user, session, account, or verification tables. These are managed by better-auth library.
Add foreign key constraints with cascade deletes: projects.userId → user(id), app_config.userId → user(id)
Add unique constraint on app_config.userId to ensure one config per user
Add indexes on frequently queried columns: projects.userId, workflows.module, workflow_executions.status, workflow_executions.projectId, workflow_steps.workflowId
Zod schemas for step configs provide runtime type safety. Define schemas first, then infer TypeScript types using z.infer<typeof schema> for single source of truth.
Docker reset script must be idempotent - safe to run multiple times without errors. Include user confirmation prompt before destroying data.
Bun test framework required for all tests. Test files must follow pattern: *.test.ts or *.spec.ts
Use Drizzle .index() method for type-safe index definitions inline in table definitions, not separate SQL files

interface.name: workflows table schema
interface.signature: workflows { id: uuid, name: text unique, displayName: text, module: text, agentId: uuid FK, initializerType: text nullable, isStandalone: boolean, requiresProjectContext: boolean, outputArtifactType: text, outputTemplateId: uuid }

interface.name: projects table schema
interface.signature: projects { id: uuid, name: text unique, path: text, userId: text FK → user(id), workflowPathId: uuid FK, initializedByExecutionId: uuid FK, executedVsPath: jsonb }

interface.name: appConfig table schema
interface.signature: app_config { id: uuid, userId: text unique FK → user(id), openrouterApiKey: text, anthropicApiKey: text, openaiApiKey: text, defaultLlmProvider: text }

interface.name: Zod schema type inference pattern
interface.signature: export const schema = z.object({ /* fields */ }); export type TypeName = z.infer<typeof schema>;

tests.standards: Bun test framework used for all testing (built-in, no additional config needed). Test files follow naming convention: *.test.ts or *.spec.ts. Tests organized co-located with source files in packages/db/src/schema/ directory. Unit tests focus on schema validation, Zod schema validation, and foreign key constraint enforcement. Integration tests validate Docker reset script functionality and database seeding idempotency.

ideas.test: Test that workflows table has initializerType field and does NOT have isProjectInitializer field by querying schema metadata
Test that projects table has userId foreign key by attempting insert with invalid userId and expecting FK violation
Test that appConfig table has unique userId constraint by attempting duplicate userId insert and expecting unique violation

Validate all 5 Zod step config schemas (AskUserStepConfig, AskUserChatStepConfig, ExecuteActionStepConfig, LLMGenerateStepConfig, DisplayOutputStepConfig) accept valid configs and reject invalid ones using safeParse
Manually test Docker reset script runs without errors, containers restart successfully, and schema is applied. Test idempotency by running 3 times consecutively.
Verify all 15 tables exist by querying PostgreSQL information_schema after reset
Verify 5 indexes created (idx_projects_user_id, idx_workflows_module, idx_workflow_executions_status, idx_workflow_executions_project_id, idx_workflow_steps_workflow_id) by querying pg_indexes
Test Bun test command runs successfully with all tests passing using 'bun test' command
